arts.sum: Juventus seek to break a streak of three consecutive draws in all competitions by hosting Bologna, a team in great form with four wins in their last five matches. Inter will open the round by hosting Parma at the Meazza with the aim of breaking a curious curse: the Nerazzurri have not won at home against the Emiliani since 2013, with a record of four draws and one defeat since then.

arts.ttl: Major boost for Real Madrid as key man set to return from injury for Atalanta showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid attacker Vinicius Junior is in line to return from a muscular injury in next week's Champions League clash with Atalanta BC.

arts.ttl: GIAN PIERO GASPERINI PHILADELPHIA COACH OF THE MONTH FOR NOVEMBER
arts.sum: The Philadelphia Coach Of The Month award for November has been assigned to Atalanta coach Gian Piero Gasperini . "The month of November for Gasperini`s Atalanta was simply perfect, with four victories out of four matches, including the 3-0 win away to Napoli and the success in Rome - said Lega Serie A CEO Luigi De Siervo -.
Aaron Ashley has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in Serie A on Friday, Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Sacchi: “Atalanta are running strong – Milan will have to play as a group against them”
arts.sum: Arrigo Sacchi previewed the upcoming clash between Atalanta and AC Milan, anticipating an open and courageous match between two teams that will face each other without fear or tension.
